concepts_used.title: 排队论基础（M/M/1）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用排队论（M/G/1, M/G/2, G/G/1, M/M/1）建模银行排队系统，计算平均等待时间和队列长度。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Our models were all based on the famous Queuing Theory. ... we used M/G/1 Queuing Model to compute the average waiting time and average queue length.

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 论文通过线性回归拟合服务时间与到达时间的关系，但未详细展开。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We can compute that the average arrival time per customer is 0×0.1+1×0.15+2×0.1+3×0.35+4×0.25+5×0.05=2.65.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 论文通过改变服务台数量、服务时间和到达率进行灵敏度分析，评估对排队性能的影响。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We proposed that the average service time should be reduced to 1.695 minutes from the original 2.450 minutes and the average arrival time should be increased to 4.219 minutes from the original 2.650 minutes, respectively.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文明确列出5条假设，包括工作时间、服务台数量、排队规则、到达和服务时间分布、外部环境稳定性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption 1. The working time of the service stations is approximately 8 hours per day... Assumption 2. We assume that the bank can have one or more than one service station placed in parallel...

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用供需模型图和成本分析图（Figure 1 & 2）直观展示最优服务水平和利润最大化原理。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Figure 1 demonstrates the notion of optimum. ... Figure 2 is another way to prove the importance of improving customer service in terms of profit maximization.

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 引言部分介绍了银行客户服务的重要性、排队问题的普遍性以及论文目标。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The issue of customer service has always been crucial for every financial sector in the world. ... In this paper, we will build a mathematical model (queuing model) based on the data of a bank...

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：摘要、引言、假设、模型、分析、案例研究、结论、致经理信。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Contents: 1 Introduction ... 2 Problem Restatement ... 3 Assumptions ... 4 Main models ... 5 Analysis ... 6 Alternative models ... 7 Case Studies ... 8 Strengths and weaknesses ... 9 Conclusions ... 10 Letter to the bank's manager

concepts_used.title: 三天/四天赛程时间分配
concepts_used.how_used: 论文在有限时间内完成了从问题重述到模型构建、求解、灵敏度分析、案例研究和最终建议的完整流程。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Our models were all based on the famous Queuing Theory. ... we used M/G/1 Queuing Model to compute the average waiting time and average queue length.
